scripts.android:assemble: npm run android:fetch-bare-kit && npm run android:bundle && ./android/gradlew -p android assembleDebug
scripts.android:check: npm run android:fetch-bare-kit && npm run android:bundle && ./android/gradlew -p android testDebugUnitTest lintDebug assembleDebug
scripts.android:device-check: npm run android:fetch-bare-kit && npm run android:bundle && ./android/gradlew -p android connectedDebugAndroidTest
scripts.build:packages: tsc -b --clean packages/bare-host-protocol packages/kepos-android-worklet && tsc -b packages/bare-host-protocol packages/kepos-android-worklet
scripts.check: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run check:home
scripts.check:home: npm run build:home && git diff --exit-code -- home/styles.css
